test case id: tc-productmanagement-013 title: user successfully updates a product's price module: productmanagement source pages: 6 preconditions: user is logged in and has a product in the system. test data: product_name=existing_product, new_price=20.99 test steps: 1. user logs in with valid credentials. 2. user navigates to the product management page. 3. user selects "existing_product" and updates its price to "20.99". expected result: product price is updated successfully and the product list is updated.
